blocks.text: Although the striker nut is fixed, the striker can be fine-tuned by the following procedure.

Loosen the screw (A) using a Torx (T-40) and tighten the screw to the extent that the striker (B) does not move. Wrap the striker in a rag and adjust it slightly with the plastic hammer (C) and sliding hammer. Tighten the screw using TORX (T-40). Close the door and check for door rattle and closure.

items: The adjustment shall be made so as not to exceed the range of fine adjustment. In addition, adjustments shall be made while checking the closure.
